title: A SANNA LAM KA KAHTO HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: A sang na lam ka kah to hi
Ni sim a thak ka tung to hi
Kah to kawm kong thum lai
Topa
Hong suan to aw a sang zaw ah

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Topa aw hong domto in la,
Ka muh ngeinai
loh van zang ah
Up na tawh ong ding to sak in
A sang zaw ah ong suan to in

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lung
manna launa tamna ah
Midang te a ut hang in ah
Kei ka lungsim a ut kei hi
Kei tupna a sang
zaw na hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A sang zaw a mi siangte’ la
Upna tawh kei mah in ka za
Dawi
mangpa’n thal in hong kap hang
Ka sang zaw nuam hi leitung sang

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: A sang pen dong
ka kah nuam hi
Vanglian a tang ka mu nuam hi
Vantung ka muh dong Topa aw
A sang zaw ah hong
pi to aw
